001/*

003 * contributor license agreements.  See the NOTICE file distributed with
004 * this work for additional information regarding copyright ownership.
005 * The ASF licenses this file to You under the Apache License, Version 2.0
006 * (the "License"); you may not use this file except in compliance with
007 * the License.  You may obtain a copy of the License at
008 *
009 *      http://www.apache.org/licenses/LICENSE-2.0
010 *
011 * Unless required by applicable law or agreed to in writing, software
012 * distributed under the License is distributed on an "AS IS" BASIS,
013 * WITHOUT WARRANTIES OR CONDITIONS OF ANY KIND, either express or implied.
014 * See the License for the specific language governing permissions and
015 * limitations under the License.
016 */
017package org.apache.juneau.bean.swagger;
018
019import static org.apache.juneau.commons.utils.AssertionUtils.*;
020import static org.apache.juneau.commons.utils.CollectionUtils.*;
021import static org.apache.juneau.commons.utils.Utils.*;
022import static org.apache.juneau.marshall.internal.ConverterUtils.*;
023
024import java.util.*;
025
026import org.apache.juneau.commons.collections.*;
027
028/**
029 * A metadata object that allows for more fine-tuned XML model definitions.
030 *
031 * <p>
032 * The Xml Object is a metadata object that allows for more fine-tuned XML model definitions in Swagger 2.0. When using
033 * arrays, XML element names are not inferred (for singular/plural forms) and the name property should be used to add
034 * that information. This object is used to control how schema properties are serialized to XML.
035 *
036 * <h5 class='section'>Swagger Specification:</h5>
037 * <p>
038 * The Xml Object is composed of the following fields:
039 * <ul class='spaced-list'>
040 *    <li><c>name</c> (string) - Replaces the name of the element/attribute used for the described schema property
041 *    <li><c>namespace</c> (string) - The URI of the namespace definition
042 *    <li><c>prefix</c> (string) - The prefix to be used for the name
043 *    <li><c>attribute</c> (boolean) - Declares whether the property definition translates to an attribute instead of an element
044 *    <li><c>wrapped</c> (boolean) - May be used only for an array definition. Signifies whether the array is wrapped
045 * </ul>
046 *
047 * <h5 class='section'>Example:</h5>
048 * <p class='bjava'>
049 *    <jc>// Construct using SwaggerBuilder.</jc>
050 *    Xml <jv>xml</jv> = <jsm>xml</jsm>()
051 *       .name(<js>"foo"</js>)
052 *       .namespace(<js>"http://foo"</js>)
053 *
054 *    <jc>// Serialize using JsonSerializer.</jc>
055 *    String <jv>json</jv> = Json.<jsm>from</jsm>(<jv>xml</jv>);
056 *
057 *    <jc>// Or just use toString() which does the same as above.</jc>
058 *  <jv>json</jv> = <jv>xml</jv>.toString();
059 * </p>
060 * <p class='bjson'>
061 *    <jc>// Output</jc>
062 *    {
063 *       <js>"name"</js>: <js>"foo"</js>,
064 *       <js>"namespace"</js>: <js>"http://foo"</js>
065 *    }
066 * </p>
067 *
068 * <h5 class='section'>See Also:</h5><ul>
069 *    <li class='link'><a class="doclink" href="https://swagger.io/specification/v2/#xml-object">Swagger 2.0 Specification &gt; XML Object</a>
070 *    <li class='link'><a class="doclink" href="https://swagger.io/docs/specification/2-0/describing-models/">Swagger Describing Models</a>
071 *    <li class='link'><a class="doclink" href="https://juneau.apache.org/docs/topics/JuneauBeanSwagger2">juneau-bean-swagger-v2</a>
072 * </ul>
073 */
074@SuppressWarnings({
075   "java:S115" // Constants use UPPER_snakeCase convention
076})
077public class Xml extends SwaggerElement {
078
079   // Argument name constants for assertArgNotNull
080   private static final String ARG_property = "property";
081
082   // Property name constants
083   private static final String PROP_attribute = "attribute";
084   private static final String PROP_namespace = "namespace";
085   private static final String PROP_prefix = "prefix";
086   private static final String PROP_name = "name";
087   private static final String PROP_wrapped = "wrapped";
088
089   private String name;
090   private String namespace;
091   private String prefix;
092   private Boolean attribute;
093   private Boolean wrapped;
094
095   /**
096    * Default constructor.
097    */
098   public Xml() {}
099
100   /**
101    * Copy constructor.
102    *
103    * @param copyFrom The object to copy.
104    */
105   public Xml(Xml copyFrom) {
106      super(copyFrom);
107
108      this.attribute = copyFrom.attribute;
109      this.name = copyFrom.name;
110      this.namespace = copyFrom.namespace;
111      this.prefix = copyFrom.prefix;
112      this.wrapped = copyFrom.wrapped;
113   }
114
115   /**
116    * Make a deep copy of this object.
117    *
118    * @return A deep copy of this object.
119    */
120   public Xml copy() {
121      return new Xml(this);
122   }
123
124   @Override /* Overridden from SwaggerElement */
125   public <T> T get(String property, Class<T> type) {
126      assertArgNotNull(ARG_property, property);
127      return switch (property) {
128         case PROP_attribute -> toType(getAttribute(), type);
129         case PROP_name -> toType(getName(), type);
130         case PROP_namespace -> toType(getNamespace(), type);
131         case PROP_prefix -> toType(getPrefix(), type);
132         case PROP_wrapped -> toType(getWrapped(), type);
133         default -> super.get(property, type);
134      };
135   }
136
137   /**
138    * Bean property getter:  <property>attribute</property>.
139    *
140    * <p>
141    * Declares whether the property definition translates to an attribute instead of an element.
142    *
143    * @return The property value, or <jk>null</jk> if it is not set.
144    */
145   public Boolean getAttribute() { return attribute; }
146
147   /**
148    * Bean property getter:  <property>name</property>.
149    *
150    * <p>
151    * The name of the element/attribute used for the described schema property.
152    *
153    * @return The property value, or <jk>null</jk> if it is not set.
154    */
155   public String getName() { return name; }
156
157   /**
158    * Bean property getter:  <property>namespace</property>.
159    *
160    * <p>
161    * The URL of the namespace definition.
162    *
163    * @return The property value, or <jk>null</jk> if it is not set.
164    */
165   public String getNamespace() { return namespace; }
166
167   /**
168    * Bean property getter:  <property>prefix</property>.
169    *
170    * <p>
171    * The prefix to be used for the name.
172    *
173    * @return The property value, or <jk>null</jk> if it is not set.
174    */
175   public String getPrefix() { return prefix; }
176
177   /**
178    * Bean property getter:  <property>wrapped</property>.
179    *
180    * <p>
181    * Signifies whether the array is wrapped (for example,
182    * <c>&lt;books&gt;&lt;book/&gt;&lt;book/&gt;&lt;books&gt;</c>) or unwrapped
183    * (<c>&lt;book/&gt;&lt;book/&gt;</c>).
184    * <br>The definition takes effect only when defined alongside <c>type</c> being <c>array</c>
185    * (outside the <c>items</c>).
186    *
187    * @return The property value, or <jk>null</jk> if it is not set.
188    */
189   public Boolean getWrapped() { return wrapped; }
190
191   @Override /* Overridden from SwaggerElement */
192   public Set<String> keySet() {
193      // @formatter:off
194      var s = setb(String.class)
195         .addIf(nn(attribute), PROP_attribute)
196         .addIf(nn(name), PROP_name)
197         .addIf(nn(namespace), PROP_namespace)
198         .addIf(nn(prefix), PROP_prefix)
199         .addIf(nn(wrapped), PROP_wrapped)
200         .build();
201      // @formatter:on
202      return new MultiSet<>(s, super.keySet());
203   }
204
205   @Override /* Overridden from SwaggerElement */
206   public Xml set(String property, Object value) {
207      assertArgNotNull(ARG_property, property);
208      return switch (property) {
209         case PROP_attribute -> setAttribute(toBoolean(value));
210         case PROP_name -> setName(s(value));
211         case PROP_namespace -> setNamespace(s(value));
212         case PROP_prefix -> setPrefix(s(value));
213         case PROP_wrapped -> setWrapped(toBoolean(value));
214         default -> {
215            super.set(property, value);
216            yield this;
217         }
218      };
219   }
220
221   /**
222    * Bean property setter:  <property>attribute</property>.
223    *
224    * <p>
225    * Declares whether the property definition translates to an attribute instead of an element.
226    *
227    * @param value
228    *    The new value for this property.
229    *    <br>Default value is <jk>false</jk>.
230    *    <br>Can be <jk>null</jk> to unset the property.
231    * @return This object.
232    */
233   public Xml setAttribute(Boolean value) {
234      attribute = value;
235      return this;
236   }
237
238   /**
239    * Bean property setter:  <property>name</property>.
240    *
241    * <p>
242    * The name of the element/attribute used for the described schema property.
243    *
244    * @param value
245    *    The new value for this property.
246    *    <br>Can be <jk>null</jk> to unset the property.
247    * @return This object.
248    */
249   public Xml setName(String value) {
250      name = value;
251      return this;
252   }
253
254   /**
255    * Bean property setter:  <property>namespace</property>.
256    *
257    * <p>
258    * The URL of the namespace definition.
259    *
260    * @param value
261    *    The new value for this property.
262    *    <br>Can be <jk>null</jk> to unset the property.
263    * @return This object.
264    */
265   public Xml setNamespace(String value) {
266      namespace = value;
267      return this;
268   }
269
270   /**
271    * Bean property setter:  <property>prefix</property>.
272    *
273    * <p>
274    * The prefix to be used for the name.
275    *
276    * @param value
277    *    The new value for this property.
278    *    <br>Can be <jk>null</jk> to unset the property.
279    * @return This object.
280    */
281   public Xml setPrefix(String value) {
282      prefix = value;
283      return this;
284   }
285
286   /**
287    * Bean property setter:  <property>wrapped</property>.
288    *
289    *
290    * <p>
291    * Signifies whether the array is wrapped (for example,
292    * <c>&lt;books&gt;&lt;book/&gt;&lt;book/&gt;&lt;books&gt;</c>) or unwrapped
293    * (<c>&lt;book/&gt;&lt;book/&gt;</c>).
294    * <br>The definition takes effect only when defined alongside <c>type</c> being <c>array</c>
295    * (outside the <c>items</c>).
296    *
297    * @param value
298    *    The new value for this property.
299    *    <br>Can be <jk>null</jk> to unset the property.
300    * @return This object.
301    */
302   public Xml setWrapped(Boolean value) {
303      wrapped = value;
304      return this;
305   }
306
307   /**
308    * Sets strict mode on this bean.
309    *
310    * @return This object.
311    */
312   @Override
313   public Xml strict() {
314      super.strict();
315      return this;
316   }
317
318   /**
319    * Sets strict mode on this bean.
320    *
321    * @param value
322    *    The new value for this property.
323    *    <br>Non-boolean values will be converted to boolean using <code>Boolean.<jsm>valueOf</jsm>(value.toString())</code>.
324    *    <br>Can be <jk>null</jk> (interpreted as <jk>false</jk>).
325    * @return This object.
326    */
327   @Override
328   public Xml strict(Object value) {
329      super.strict(value);
330      return this;
331   }
332}
